command.text:
declare @vCode varchar(32), @vName nvarchar(512) select @vCode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_mau_ct_dr' select @vName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_mau_ct) else rtrim(ten_mau_ct2) end from dmmauct where ma_mau_ct = @vCode
if @vName is null select @vCode = '', @vName = '' select 'this._vCode=''' + replace(replace(@vCode, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';this._vName=''' + replace(replace(@vName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';activeForm(this);' as message return

declare @message nvarchar(4000), @taxCode varchar(32), @taxAccountName nvarchar(512), @taxAccount varchar(32), @taxRate numeric(5, 2), @baseCurrency varchar(32), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @taxCode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_thue_0' select @taxAccount = a.tk_thue_co, @taxAccountName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(b.ten_tk) else rtrim(b.ten_tk2) end, @taxRate = a.thue_suat from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_co = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @taxCode select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit
if not exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @taxCode) select @taxCode = '', @taxRate = 0 if @taxAccountName is null select @taxAccount = '', @taxAccountName = ''
select @message = 'this._taxCode=''' + rtrim(@taxCode) + ''';this._taxAccount=''' + rtrim(@taxAccount) + ''';this._taxAccountName=''' + replace(replace(@taxAccountName, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';this._taxRate=' + rtrim(@taxRate) + ';this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._baseCurrency=''' + rtrim(@baseCurrency) + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';initForm(this);' &CommandWhenInvoiceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'initForm(this);' &CommandWhenInvoiceBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

&CheckTaxCodeDeclare;
declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_nt = '') begin select rtrim(val) as ma_nt, 1 as ty_gia from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' return end
&CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarningMessage;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select @stt_rec as stt_rec return

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh and kh_yn = 1) begin select rtrim(ten_kh) as ten_kh, rtrim(dia_chi) as dia_chi, rtrim(ma_so_thue) as ma_so_thue from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh return end

if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select a.thue_suat, rtrim(a.tk_thue_co) as tk_thue_co, rtrim(a.ten_thue%l) as ten_thue%l from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_co = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @ma_thue return end
